name: Fluentd
description: Fluentd — Observability / Logging / Tracing tool for developers. Specializes in Log Management.

seo.title: Fluentd Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Fluentd analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Observability / Logging / Tracing.

review.verdict: Best for distributed systems debugging. Fluentd offers custom pricing.
pros: Centralized logs, metrics, and traces in one place
cons: Data ingestion pricing can spike unexpectedly
